training-process.title: How the Training Works
training-process.description: Our trainings are 100% hands-on, with a practical component of 70% and 30% theory. They take place on-site, at our location, or online (on all common platforms). Additionally, participants receive free handouts and materials that they can use for further study and application.

first.title: Fundamentals
first.description: At the beginning, we ensure that all participants are brought to the same knowledge level, regardless of their starting point. This way, everyone is optimally prepared for the upcoming topics, and no one is left behind.

second.title: Implementation
second.description: We start with an introduction to the topic, followed by demos and practical examples. Participants then practice independently while the trainer provides individual feedback and makes corrections as needed.

third.title: Use Cases
third.description: The learned concepts are applied to specific use cases of the participants. In a practice-oriented session, we work together to develop solutions that help participants integrate the knowledge directly into their daily work.

community.title: Community Focus
community.subtitle: Portal for participants & trainers as well as Virtual Classroom

advantages.title: Future Security
advantages.subtitle: Kodschul IT training keeps your company up-to-date to secure competitive advantages.

advantages.title: Empowerment
advantages.subtitle: With Kodschul, you use innovative technologies optimally to strengthen your market position.

advantages.title: Practical Orientation
advantages.subtitle: Kodschul offers practical training and experienced trainers who ensure direct and effective knowledge transfer.

advantages.title: Adaptability
advantages.subtitle: Kodschul training equips your team with the flexibility to quickly adapt to new challenges and succeed.

agenda.heading: Agenda
agenda.practical: Mix of theory and practice, with about 70% of the course consisting of practical learning.

card.title: Participation also possible online
card.description: If desired, our seminars can also be booked or requested as an online seminar (Virtual Classroom). Simply select the appropriate option during your booking or inquiry.

in-house-training.title: In-House/Company Training
in-house-training.description: Content can be adapted to the needs of your team upon request.
in-house-training.environment: Complete learning environment in the cloud with remote access

after-care.title: After Care
after-care.description: Support after the training through individual follow-up
